booking.subject: How do I book a villa or penthouse?
booking.content: Simply select your desired property, choose dates, and complete the booking form. Our agents will follow up to confirm.

booking.subject: Can I make a last-minute booking?
booking.content: Yes, subject to availability. We recommend contacting our team directly for urgent bookings.

booking.subject: Is there a minimum stay requirement?
booking.content: Yes, most villas and penthouses have a minimum stay of 2–3 nights. Specifics vary by property.

booking.subject: What is the cancellation policy?
booking.content: Cancellations made 14 days prior are fully refundable. Please check individual listing policies for exceptions.

booking.subject: Can I modify my reservation after booking?
booking.content: Yes, changes can be made depending on availability. Contact support for assistance.

payment.subject: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.content: We accept credit/debit cards, bank transfers, and some mobile payment options.

payment.subject: Do I need to pay a deposit?
payment.content: Yes, a 30–50% deposit is usually required to confirm your booking.

payment.subject: Is the payment secure?
payment.content: Absolutely. Our platform uses encryption and secure payment gateways to protect your information.

payment.subject: When is the remaining balance due?
payment.content: The remaining balance is typically due 7 days before check-in.

property.subject: Are the villas and penthouses private?
property.content: Yes, all listings are exclusive and private unless stated otherwise.

property.subject: What amenities are included?
property.content: Common amenities include pools, private chefs, housekeeping, and Wi-Fi. Check each listing for full details.

property.subject: Can I request additional services?
property.content: Yes, we offer add-ons like airport transfers, private chefs, and spa treatments upon request.

property.subject: Are pets allowed?
property.content: Some properties are pet-friendly. Please use the filters or ask our team for options.

guest.subject: Is the property child-friendly?
guest.content: Yes, many of our listings are suitable for families. Look for child-friendly tags on listings.

guest.subject: How do I check in?
guest.content: Check-in instructions will be emailed to you after booking. Most properties offer contactless check-in.

guest.subject: What should I do if I have an issue during my stay?
guest.content: Contact our 24/7 guest support line. We're here to help you immediately.

guest.subject: Can I host events or parties?
guest.content: Some properties allow private events. Prior approval is required and additional fees may apply.

other.subject: Do you offer loyalty rewards or membership?
other.content: We're working on a loyalty program. Stay tuned!

other.subject: Can I list my own villa or penthouse?
other.content: Yes, property owners can contact us to discuss listing terms and conditions.

other.subject: Do you offer group or corporate booking options?
other.content: Yes, we handle large group bookings and corporate retreats. Contact us for tailored packages.
